coreIssue: This check-in is likely about what support a lead partner alliance manager needs as more of his time goes into selling partnership value.
openingQuestion: What’s taking the most energy right now when you’re making the partnership case internally or with customers?
listenFor: whether he names one repeat objection or stall point that keeps coming up
whether he volunteers where your air cover, assets, or faster decisions would help
whether he sounds stretched across too many conversations or one specific deal path
avoid: do not turn the check-in into a review of whether he is influencing well enough
do not jump straight to fixes before you know where the partnership story is actually getting stuck
goodOutcome: You and Machar have agreed one concrete way you will make lead-level partnership selling easier for him this fortnight, such as joining a key conversation or clearing one internal decision path.
suggestedAction: During the 1:1, ask him to pick one current internal or customer conversation where your involvement would most change the odds, and agree that intervention live.
confidence: Medium — based on your note about rising busyness and repeated value-selling on both sides
dontAssume: That he is struggling at the role: increased selling effort can just mean the partnership case needs more backing or clearer internal alignment.
